name: IRC_CAMP_MSTEAMS_BOTS
description: Table to store the MS Teams BOT details. This data is also used to generate manifest file for customers.

columns.Name: CAMP_MSTEAMS_BOT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated

columns.Name: BOT_APP_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Microsoft Bot’s Azure app registration ID (client ID).

columns.Name: BOT_SHORT_NAME
columns.Comments: Short display name for bot. To be used in manifest json file

columns.Name: BOT_FULL_NAME
columns.Comments: Full name (longer, for description context). To be used in manifest json file

columns.Name: BOT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: A brief description. To be used in manifest json file

columns.Name: BOT_FULL_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: More detailed description. To be used in manifest json file

columns.Name: BOT_COLOR_ICON
columns.Comments: PNG, 192x192 pixels, for app display. To be used in manifest json file

columns.Name: BOT_OUTLINE_ICON
columns.Comments: PNG, 32x32 pixels, for Teams channels and lists. To be used in manifest json file

columns.Name: TENANT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores customer tenant guid of Microsoft azure

columns.Name: BOT_AUTHENTICATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Whether it is certificate or client secrete (ORA_CLIENT_SECRET or ORA_CLIENT_CERTIFICATE)

columns.Name: BOT_CREDENTIAL_REF
columns.Comments: Reference to credential in Recruiting credential store

columns.Name: BOT_MANIFEST_UUID
columns.Comments: This will generate while saving the bot first time. To be used in manifest json file

columns.Name: BOT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicate the BOT deleted from FSM. Either ORA_ACTIVE or ORA_DELETE

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
